search.query:
eventId.reason: FailedMount |
SELECT
  cast(diff [1] as bigint) as today,
  cast((diff [1]-diff [2]) as bigint) as lastday,
  hostname,
  kind,
  namespace,
  name,
  message,
  reason
FROM  (
    SELECT
      compare(total, 86400) as diff,
      arbitrary(hostname) as hostname,
      arbitrary(kind) as kind,
      arbitrary(namespace) as namespace,
      arbitrary(name) as name,
      arbitrary(message) as message,
      arbitrary(reason) as reason
    FROM      (
        SELECT
          COUNT(*) as total,
          max_by("object-kind", __time__) as kind,
          max_by("object-namespace", __time__) as namespace,
          max_by("object-name", __time__) as name,
          max_by("message", __time__) as message,
          max_by("hostname", __time__) as hostname,
          max_by("eventId.reason", __time__) as reason
        FROM          log
      )
  )
